wikitext: []: NGE BD Standard Edition - Fly me to the moon             Quote Post by Shun » Sat Sep 26, 2020 12:02 pm Does anyone know if in 2019 Blu Ray Standard Edition of NGE* there is "Fly me to the moon" (ending songs and bgm)? In 2015 BD box there is it, but it's absent on Netflix. What about 2019 box? * https://www.blu-ray.com/movies/Neon-Genesis-Evangelion-Blu-ray-BOX-STANDARD-EDITION-Blu-ray/249404/
